name: ABDOMINAL CALCIFICATIONS & OPACITIES

demographics.Location: vertical midline abdominal incisions (mainly), esp. in linea alba

distribution: vertical midline abdominal incisions (mainly), esp. in linea alba
discriminating_features: sheetlike calcifications surrounding bowel and mesentery

general: sheetlike calcifications surrounding bowel and mesentery
small mottled / punctate calcifications in primary site ± in regional lymph node
line of attenuation similar to muscle
mimick abscess due to numerous gas pockets
multiple high-density linear branching structures within mesentery extending to
linear high-attenuation area along the direction of the surgical incision
stringlike calcifications up to 12 cm long
